author: SN7C
content: Decision: In _build_pipeline, apply wrap->filter/map->batch (not batch->wrap_batch). This means batched paths now use collation_fn=None (since items are typed samples, not raw WDS dicts) and a simple SampleBatch constructor instead of wrap_batch. Added explicit ValueError for batch_size<1 instead of relying on cryptic IndexError from WDS internals.
